ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "order_details" TEXT /* Details of the order */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount charged for the order */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, shipped, delivered, canceled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  "refunded_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded if applicable */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subscription if the order is part of a subscription service */,
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bundle if the order is part of a bundle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is active */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product details were last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order for which the invoice is generated */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "invoice_amount" TEXT /* Total amount on the invoice */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Link to download the invoice */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the invoice (e.g., paid, unpaid, pending) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order related to the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., order, fee) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the transaction (e.g., success, failure, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seller_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction for which the fee is charged */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., seller fee) */,
  "fee_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the fee */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the fee was charged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the fee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seller_fees_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES financial_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the supplier was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the supplier details were last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
